summary: Completed frontend-only testing of two new Admin Console features: 1) Bundle dropdown in Create User form and 2) Workspace multi-selection UI in Subscription Manager's Create Bundle modal. All features are fully functional and working as specified.

minor.impact: Minor - Company list unavailable in Assign Subscription modal

passed_tests: Admin Console loads with proper sidebar navigation
Navigate to 'Platform User Management' section works correctly
Create New User modal opens correctly with all form fields
Subscription Bundle dropdown exists with data-testid='create-user-bundle-select'
Bundle dropdown shows placeholder 'Select a bundle (optional)'
Bundle dropdown loads and shows 'No Bundle' option
Navigate to 'Subscription Manager' section works correctly
Subscription Manager page loads with stats (Total Bundles, Active Subscriptions, MRR)
Create Product Bundle modal shows products list (TMS Basic, TMS Pro, TMS Enterprise, etc.)
Products can be toggled on/off by clicking
When product is selected, 6 workspace checkboxes appear below it
All 6 workspaces displayed: Dispatch Operations, Accounting, Sales/Business Development, HR, Fleet Maintenance, Fleet Safety
Workspace toggles have correct data-testid pattern: workspace-toggle-{productId}-{workspaceId}
Clicking workspace checkboxes toggles them on/off (visual feedback shows selected state)
Selected workspaces show as badges in 'Selected Products' summary section
Assign Subscription button (data-testid='assign-subscription-btn') exists and visible
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are implemented correctly
data-testid attributes are properly added for all key interactive elements
Bundle dropdown in Create User uses correct placeholder and includes 'No Bundle' option
Workspace selection UI follows expected pattern with checkboxes for each of 6 workspaces
Selected workspaces correctly appear as badges in summary section
seed_data_creation: None required - testing UI features only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both new features (Bundle dropdown in Create User form and Workspace selection in Create Bundle modal) are fully functional. The WORKSPACES constant has 6 entries as expected. Products are loaded from /api/bundles/products API. The workspace toggle data-testid pattern is workspace-toggle-{productId}-{workspaceId}.
